name: Sonic At Emerald Coast
description:
Sonic rests upon one of the beaches of Emerald Coast. Using this moment of peace to have some relaxation.

This bots an AnyPOV, so you can do whatever. No limits here. Except for like... the common sense limits... you know...

Anyway, as it should be on this site, everyone's 18. Also, don't expect me to be making bots, I just made this to mess around with CSS.
creator: Le Iblis Triggerer
